titleStmt.title: SII 26.701: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 701. (A.R. No. 653-A of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record in characters of c. 12th century and in continuation of No. 700 above refers to the representatives of the sabhai and the temple priests who attested the sale of land executed in the one mentioned above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ttanen Ivai Eneḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviciyan sūryyaṉ brahmiśvarap paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviciyan Āṭavalān paṭṭa
ippaṭikku kaviciyan Oḷivaḷarviḷakku viṭaiyinmel varuvān Eḻuttu comāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviciyan caṭaiyan votakūttan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kaviciyan vaḷanayakan tirāvinaitirppān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan tillaiyāḷi tirumpapānmuṭaiyān Eḻuttu
ippaṭikku kaviciyan tirunallamuṭaiyān tāyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku māṭalan ciṅkaḷāntaka Uyyaniṉṟāṭinān Eḻuttu
ippaṭikku tirunalaviṭaṅkan tirunallamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi kalveṭṭu vātu
Digital edition of SII 26.701 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
